scenarios.title: Computer Vision Modeling and Augmentation
scenarios.when_to_read: Image augmentation, PIL/Pillow operations, vision datasets/transforms, classification and detection models, segmentation, YOLO/SAM/OpenMMLab workflows, and model export.
scenarios.role: Use `ultralytics` for Ultralytics YOLO package workflows: CLI/Python model usage, data/config setup, train/val, prediction/results, export/deployment, tracking/solutions, model-family selection, and repo development.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `ultralytics` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: data and configuration, export and deployment, inference and results, model families and tasks, repo development, and 2 other focused workflows.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `ultralytics` when the request names `ultralytics`, centers on Ultralytics YOLO package workflows: CLI/Python model usage, data/config setup, train/val, prediction/results, export/deployment, tracking/solutions, model-family selection, and repo development, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in computer vision modeling and augmentation. Then route to data and configuration, export and deployment, inference and results, or model families and tasks when those focused workflows match.
